title: ColumnDefinition
description: Defines a single displayable column in a Gateway Grid, binding a Collection field key to a header label. This is the evolved object form, matching the gateway/grid-column block's attribute shape (fieldKey, label), and supersedes bare string field keys used in the legacy PHP $columns array.

key.description: The Collection field accessor key whose value this column displays (e.g. 'title', 'status', 'created_at'). For dotted paths on related objects use dot notation (e.g. 'author.name').

label.description: Human-readable column header text shown in the grid UI. When omitted, consumers fall back to the field key.

sortable.description: Whether the user can click this column header to sort by it. Default true. Set false for computed attributes, long-text fields, or relationship fields that require complex joins.
